overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a shield-bearing character exploring a gothic medieval city at night. The character moves through covered walkways, indoor halls, and elevated terraces with a large moon visible in the sky. The environment features detailed stone architecture, torch lighting, and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with manicured hedges alongside gothic architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered pathway with shield raised, passing wall lanterns and trimmed hedges

entered.detail: tall stone facade with arched windows and intricate carvings, partially covered in ivy
tall dense green hedges lining the right side of the walkway
wet reflective stone tiles forming the walking surface
oversized pale moon visible in the night sky above the buildings
ornate iron lanterns casting warm orange light on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered stone walkway at night, flanked by a gothic stone building on the left and tall manicured hedges on the right. Warm lantern light illuminates the wet stone tiles while a large moon hangs visible in the sky ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic interior hall with wall sconces and decorative banner

events.description: character turns left and enters the arched doorway, transitioning from outdoor walkway to indoor stone hall
character approaches and collects gold loot item from a stone bench, UI shows +15 Gold

agents.ego_description: turning left to enter the building, then approaching a stone bench to collect a glowing loot item

entered.detail: tall gothic archway with carved stone patterns marking the entrance
burning torches mounted on the interior stone walls
large crimson banner with gold embroidery hanging on the far wall
stone seating with glowing loot item resting on top
small glowing interactive object collected by the character

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit gothic interior through an arched doorway, leaving the moonlit walkway behind. Inside, warm torchlight illuminates stone walls and a large red banner, while the character collects a gold loot item from a stone bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior staircase and corridor leading to terrace exit

events.description: character exits the building through an arched doorway onto an elevated outdoor terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs and navigating interior corridors toward the terrace exit

entered.detail: wide stone steps with metal railings ascending to upper level
large woven wall hanging depicting a figure with a bow
massive carved columns supporting the ceiling
pointed archway leading to bright outdoor terrace

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stone staircase within the gothic interior, passing tapestries and pillars. The segment ends as the character approaches and exits through an arched doorway leading back outside to a terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace overlooking expansive gothic cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the terrace while observing the panoramic city view with spires and moonlit sky

entered.detail: wide open stone platform with geometric tile patterns
ornate stone balustrade along the edge of the terrace
expansive view of illuminated spires, towers, and buildings stretching into the distance
weathered stone sculpture of a robed figure on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a wide elevated terrace with sweeping views of a moonlit gothic city. Walking along the stone balustrade, the character passes a stone statue while the camera reveals the expansive skyline of spires and illuminated windows against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage with wooden barricades and overgrown vegetation

events.description: character turns right and enters a darker narrow passage with wooden structures and debris

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow passage and approaching a wooden barricade with a glowing green light visible beyond

entered.detail: confined walkway with rough stone walls and debris on the ground
heavy wooden planks forming a doorway with green light emanating from beyond
stone walls covered in dense climbing vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character turns from the terrace into a narrow, darker passage with rough stone walls covered in ivy. The ground becomes uneven with debris as the character approaches a wooden barricade, with mysterious green light visible through the doorway ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit exterior walkway through a gothic interior and back out onto an elevated terrace before descending into a dark, ivy-covered passage. It begins along a covered stone path flanked by manicured hedges under a large moon, moving forward until the character passes through an arched doorway into a dimly lit interior. As the camera follows the character past red banners and up a stone staircase, the scene shifts from the warmth of torchlit halls back toward the night air. The view then expands across a wide terrace with a stone balustrade, revealing a sweeping skyline of gothic spires and illuminated windows. Finally, the camera turns away from the vista into a narrow, debris-strewn corridor of rough stone and ivy, where a mysterious green light glows through a wooden barricade.
